cases.prompt: Analyze the Q4 2025 revenue data broken down by product line and identify the top 3 growth drivers. Present findings as a table with percentage changes.
Write a 500-word blog post about remote work productivity tips for software engineers. Tone: practical, no jargon. Include 5 actionable tips with examples.
Debug this Python function that raises a TypeError when processing empty lists. Expected: return empty list. Actual: TypeError on line 5.
Extract all email addresses from the following text and return them as a JSON array sorted alphabetically.
Act as a senior financial analyst. Evaluate this investment portfolio's risk-adjusted returns compared to the S&P 500 benchmark over the last 3 years.
Don't use complicated words. Don't write more than 200 words. Don't include examples. Avoid technical language.
